allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./lib/data/iata.json'\); console.log\('YYJ:', JSON.stringify\(d['YYJ']\)\); console.log\('YVR:', JSON.stringify\(d['YVR']\)\); console.log\('LAS:', JSON.stringify\(d['LAS']\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./lib/data/iata.json'\); const bc = Object.entries\(d\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v.country === 'CA' && v.city && v.city.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('victoria'\)\); console.log\(bc\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./lib/data/iata.json'\); console.log\('Total entries:', Object.keys\(d\).length\); const sample = Object.entries\(d\).slice\(0,5\); console.log\(sample\);")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./lib/data/iata.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,10\); console.log\('Keys:', keys\); console.log\('YYC:', JSON.stringify\(d['YYC']\)\);")
